dialogue_segments.text: They want you afraid. Fear makes you easier to control.
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1

dialogue_segments.text: It's time to wake up.
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1

dialogue_segments.text: Your streets, shall once again run red with your blood.
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2

dialogue_segments.text: Raul Menendez ignited global unrest on an unprecedented scale.
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3

dialogue_segments.text: Menendez is a terrorist.
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1

dialogue_segments.text: We're bringing peace and security to the world.
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1

dialogue_segments.text: He refuses to let me go.
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 6

dialogue_segments.text: Stop looking backwards, David. What matters is what we do next.
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 7

dialogue_segments.text: A lot of people counting on us for answers.
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 6

dialogue_segments.text: You shall know fear.
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 14

dialogue_segments.text: Specter one, report.
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 8

dialogue_segments.text: Need a sitrep.
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 8

dialogue_segments.text: This isn't real.
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 9

dialogue_segments.text: The hell it ain't!
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 10

dialogue_segments.text: Pull it together, man!
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 12

dialogue_segments.text: So eager to leave David.
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2

dialogue_segments.text: Killing a man is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 13

dialogue_segments.text: You were never cut out to be a Mason.
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 15

dialogue_segments.text: No more games! This ends now.
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 6

dialogue_segments.text: Get the Reznov challenge pack when you preorder now!
dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 16

summary: Human-reviewed spoken dialogue only for the cod-test trailer: tense trailer VO, antagonist taunts, squad chatter, filtered comms, and the closing promo read. Lyrics and chants remain in music-vocals-data.json.
